name: Sport Chek
why_target: Canada's largest sporting goods chain and the dominant retailer for Canada Soccer Mens national team kit and adidas WC2026 Trionda match ball; flagship CF Toronto Eaton Centre store sits 8 mins from BMO Field which hosts 6 WC2026 matches incl. Canada's opener; loyalty file (Triangle Rewards) covers most adult Canadians
notes: Owned by Canadian Tire Corporation (TSX:CTC.A). HQ: 2700 Matheson Blvd East, Mississauga ON L4W 4V9. FGL Sports Ltd is the operating arm (also runs Atmosphere, Sports Experts, Pro Hockey Life, Hockey Experts, National Sports, Nevada Bob's). Greg Hicks is President & CEO Canadian Tire Corp. TJ Flood is President Canadian Tire Retail. Approx 190 banner stores across Canada.

notes: Sister banner to Sport Chek under FGL Sports / Canadian Tire (TSX:CTC.A). HQ Calgary. Many stores co-located or rebranded from former Forzani Group acquisitions. ~70 locations across Canada.

name: Sports Experts

Boutiques dans la plupart des centres commerciaux du Quebec (Carrefour Laval, Place Sainte-Foy, Galeries de la Capitale, etc.).

name: SAIL

name: JD Sports Canada

(unverified pattern: customerservice@jdsports.ca; backup customerchampions@jdplc.com).

name: Sporting Life

name: National Sports
store_count: Closed 2023 - banner being relaunched by FGL

notes: All physical National Sports stores closed by FGL Sports Sept 2023. Brand owned by Canadian Tire Corp (TSX:CTC.A). Listed here for completeness; direct outreach should route through Sport Chek / FGL Sports.

name: Soccer World Toronto
regions: GTA (Mississauga + Maple + Vaughan + Brampton + Etobicoke + Markham + Scarborough + Woodbridge)
